revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-165

Source of radiation, the dimensions of which are small enough, compared with the distance between source and receptor, for them to be neglected in calculations.


Reference: C.I.E.
